session_outcome: COMPLETE — src/proxy.ts created with IP rate limiting for /api/webhook (10/min) and /api/notifications/send (20/min). RISK-003 resolved.

validation.build: PASS — 34 routes + Proxy active, no deprecation warning

critical_security.action_required: Rotate Firebase service account key immediately. Remove from git history.

nextjs_16_findings.request_ip: REMOVED in Next.js 16. Use x-forwarded-for header or @vercel/functions ipAddress().
nextjs_16_findings.middleware_convention: DEPRECATED in Next.js 16. Use proxy.ts with export function proxy instead of middleware.ts with export function middleware.
nextjs_16_findings.rate_limit_approach: In-memory sliding window Map in proxy.ts. Per-replica. No Redis dependency.
